title: The Tiny Hotel Room
content: When Olivia opened the door to her hotel room in Tokyo, she was surprised by its size. The room was much smaller than it appeared in the photos online. There was barely enough space for her suitcase and a narrow path to the bed. At first, she felt disappointed. However, after spending a few days exploring the city, she realized she was rarely in the room anyway. It was clean, comfortable, and located in an excellent neighborhood. Eventually, Olivia appreciated the efficient design and learned that small spaces could still be practical and enjoyable.
